user.title: Create BeSMART integration
user.description: Create a BeSMART integration by authenticating with BeSMART service.

data_description.name: Name of the integration.
data_description.username: Provide username for the BeSMART account.
data_description.password: Provide password for the BeSMART account.
data_description.mode: Select available work modes of BeSMART controlled device
data_description.verify_ssl: Verify the BeSMART cloud TLS certificate. Disable only if login fails due to a broken/incomplete certificate chain.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the BeSMART cloud (the cloud itself refreshes roughly every 3 minutes).
